title: Planning lane only. Review the current slide-skill goal-enforcement work in /Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide. Focus on whether the runtime now truly fail-closes on missing or non-PASS visual-qa-checklist receipts, and whether any small but necessary gap remains in docs or tests. Do not edit files...
summary_text: - **1) Fail-close status:** **Partially yes.** Finalization is fail-closed for missing/non-`PASS` checklist receipts: native delivery fails inspection when checklist is missing/pending/non-`PASS` ([run-slide-delivery.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-delivery.js:410), [run-slide-delivery.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-delivery.js:508), [run-slide-delivery.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-delivery.js:960)), and final selection hard-blocks if checklist file is missing or checklist `status !== PASS` ([run-slide-finish.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-finish.js:94), [run-slide-finish.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-finish.js:98)). - Checklist status computation itself is strict (`PASS` only when all slide entries are `pass`) in [record-visual-qa.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/record-visual-qa.js:94). - **2) Smallest remaining gap:** `run-slide-variant-matrix` can still emit `PREVIEW_ONLY` and become `READY_FOR_SELECTION` without evaluating checklist completeness/pass; it only ensures checklist file presence in preview-only paths ([run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js:726), [run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js:734), [run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js:557), [run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js:1084)). - **3) Is another code change necessary?** If your goal is “truly fail-close at runtime stage boundaries,” **yes, one small code change is necessary** (evaluate checklist in preview-only variant writers before marking selectable). If your goal is only “no final artifact promotion without PASS checklist,” current code already enforces that; then docs/tests tightening is enough.
